name: Mama's Creations, Inc.
business: Mama's Creations, Inc. is a leading marketer and manufacturer of fresh deli-prepared foods, found in over 12,000 grocery, mass, club and convenience stores nationally. Its primary products include chicken, beef and turkey meatballs, meat loaf, sausage-related products, and pasta and rice entrees. The products are principally sold to supermarkets, club chains, mass-market retailers, and food distributors.

exposures.sentence: Cyberattacks impacting our computer networks or information technology systems could have an adverse impact on our business.
